title: Jadonna Veloz
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Jadonna Veloz |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Dark |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I'll just be glad to get this arm into bacta.''"
"''Ripped cartilage and ligaments…that's gotta hurt. But Cloud City's sure to have adequate meds.''"
"''Oh, they do. It's quite a place, Han. You'll see.|Jadonna Veloz and Han Solo|}} '''Jadonna Veloz''' was a [[Color/Legends|dark]]-skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who [[Captain/Legends|captained]] the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Wayward Girl]]'' during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Veloz was hired to haul a shipment of [[Nerf steak/Legends|nerf tenderloin steaks]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] to the [[Yarith Bespin/Legends|Yarith Bespin]] [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on the world of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] but was left unable to [[Pilot/Legends|fly]] her ship after she broke her [[Limb/Legends|arm]] in an accident with a malfunctioning [[anti-grav loader]]. Determined to deliver her cargo on schedule, Veloz engaged the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] to fly the ''Wayward Girl'' to Bespin for her. Solo hurried over to Alderaan on a fast [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and successfully piloted Veloz and her ship to the Yarith Bespin, which allowed her to make her delivery on [[Time/Legends|time]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|That's a beldon! They're really rare. In all the years I've been flying through these clouds, I've never seen one.|Jadonna Veloz, to Han Solo, during their approach to Bespin|}} Jadonna Veloz was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who worked as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Veloz operated the vessel ''[[Wayward Girl]]'', and her work took her through the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] many [[Time/Legends|times]] during her career. Circa [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' to c. [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]–[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. As Jadonna Veloz's journey to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] with the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] appears in the opening scene of the first chapter of ''Rebel Dawn'', their voyage can therefore be dated to c. 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. Veloz was hired to haul a shipment of prime [[Nerf steak/Legends|nerf tenderloin steaks]] from the planet Alderaan to the [[Yarith Bespin/Legends|Yarith Bespin]], a luxury [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] situated in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on Bespin. However, she was struck by a malfunctioning [[Hoversled/Legends|repulsorsled]]{{CSWECite|III|301|Veloz, Jadonna}} [[anti-grav loader]] before leaving Alderaan with her cargo, which tore the cartilage and ligaments in her right [[Limb/Legends|arm]] and left her in great pain. Veloz had a tight deadline to meet for delivery of the [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]] tenderloins and so chose not to seek immediate medical treatment for her arm in order not to risk her cargo arriving late. Instead, as a temporary measure, she donned a sling to hold her arm in place. Her injury left her unable to pilot the ''Wayward Girl'' unaided, so she advertised on the [[HoloNet/Legends|spacer nets]] for a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to help her pilot the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to Cloud [[City/Legends|City]]. The aspiring [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] responded to the ad, and Veloz paid for him to take a fast [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] from the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to join her on Alderaan. Solo and Veloz departed on the ''Wayward Girl'', with Solo flying the ship supported by Veloz as co-pilot. After a journey lasting two [[Standard day/Legends|days]], they arrived at Bespin and set a course through the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of the planet to Cloud City. By this stage, Veloz was weary of the pain from her injury and was keen to get to their destination as soon as possible to seek medical attention and have [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] applied to her arm. On their approach to Cloud City, the ship passed a [[Beldon/Legends|beldon]], a rare [[Species/Legends|species]] of giant flying creature, much to Veloz's excitement. The ''Wayward Girl'' then docked at the Yarith Bespin hotel, and Veloz delivered her cargo on time; she paid Solo for his services, and they said their farewells. Solo used the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] that he received from the trip to pay for a room and meals while he competed in the [[Cloud City Sabacc Tournament]], a major [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] competition hosted at the Yarith Bespin. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Just hang on, Jadonna. We'll get you straight to the med facility.''"
"''Hey, Han, no complaints from me. You've done great.|Han Solo and Jadonna Veloz, while approaching Cloud City aboard the ''Wayward Girl''|}} Jadonna Veloz was [[Color/Legends|dark]]-skinned, with a short, stocky build and long, straight, black [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. When Veloz was hired to haul tenderloin steaks to Cloud City and injured her right arm, she was willing to prioritize the delivery of her cargo on schedule over her personal well-being, even though that meant enduring the pain in her arm for the two days that it took to travel to Bespin. Veloz was thrilled when she spotted a beldon while approaching Cloud City, as she had never seen one before in all her [[Standard year/Legends|years]] passing through Bespin. ==Behind the scenes== Jadonna Veloz was created by author [[A. C. Crispin]] and appeared in the [[1998]] novel ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'', the final installment of [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']]. ==Appearances== *''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jadonna Veloz }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Veloz, Jadonnna}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Pilots]]
